ruleset: Microsoft-compatible FreeCell: four free cells, eight tableau columns, four foundations, and legal single-card moves. Supermoves are treated as shorthand for legal single-card move sequences.
methodologyNotes: Deal #11982 is the only unsolvable deal in the original Microsoft 1-32,000 set recorded by the Internet FreeCell Project.
The seven later deal numbers are the commonly cited impossible deals from the extended Microsoft-compatible 1,000,000-deal range.
This dataset records known unsolvable deals from published FreeCell solver/community records. It is not a new first-party exhaustive search run.
